Tomorrow I'll have to kill her too...
I shouldn't have given her a name on a whim. It's only a few
syllables, just something to call her by, so why...?
Why does it hurt so much? *Sob* *Sob*...
I'm sorry... I'm so sorry! I'm too weak! I can't protect anything!
The body of a homunculus. It's still warm.
There's a warm, glowing light. Fully restore the party?
The party's HP and MP has been fully restored!
